reviews.review_description: I bought this primarily for the co-op and it's truly fantastic. Think Superhot but with a slight puzzle element in how you need to co-ordinate. My only complaint is that I wish there was more. If the devs brought out a pack with more co-op segments, I would buy it in a heartbeat.

Atmosphere and execution of the concept are top notch for the price.  I bought this thinking of co-op Superhot, which it does a great job of, but the experience is very short.  Single player has more content and is also very enjoyable, but I wish they had focused exclusively on co-op as it is a tense and hilarious experience trying to coordinate to pass each level with a friend.  It's like a blend of Portal 2 co-op and Superhot, but is uniquely it's own thing.  Please add more co-op levels!
Epic experience, just needs Quest Achievements!!
i just get stuck on looking for network every time i try it,

reviews.review_title: Software in alpha version at most.
reviews.review_description:
Just bought it and tried to played with my friend. 
Tutorial was ok (did not play single player though).
However upon starting multiplayer game, first problem appeared: I was about 3m under the floor, solved by restarting and redrawing roomscale, never needed before. 
When we started to play the game, I immediately noticed something is off, just some examples:
Enemies hitboxes, sometimes hit works, sometimes not. Looks like sync issue. Game breaking bug when you start with few bullets, making game unplayable (or unwinnable). More and more such bugs appears, like knife you throw is going off way, disappearing suddenly, or just bounce off enemy. A chopper we met during gameplay had turret. However the turret fly independently from chopper. First time chopper even did not appear, so imagine turret flying in air shooting at you. 
I cant recommend to buy this game at this stage. I will request refund.

Initially me and my friend ran into a few issues, but restarting the application seemed to help. We ran through all 6 modules together and had a great time and were challenged pretty good with certain puzzles. More multiplayer modules please. Give this game a try, now ima do the single player experience.

So far I have only played this in co-op mode and have really enjoyed it. There are many similarities between this and Super Hot and in my opinion the developer did a great job of building upon its predecessor. What is offered here is polished and worth your money and time. It's challenging, a moderately good work out and particularly fun in co-op. For full disclosure I really enjoy this genre where time moves when the player moves. It's unique to VR and I applaud the dev of chronostrike for their successful effort to adapt this to a co-op format, well-done.

Great game, in the same genre as Superhot VR, and Action Hero. It starts slow, and builds quickly. I think the biggest difference is in Chronostrike, I was more likely to be shot from the side by someone I hadn't even seen. Lol. I wish there were more levels!
Unfortunately I didn’t know what else to buy before my meta credits expired. But I just could not get on with this game, even though I’ve played similar titles.

reviews.review_title: The evolution of the super hot genre
reviews.review_description:
Super hot fans have been eating good recently first with Vendetta Forever and now Chronostrike !

Its a no brainer for anyone that likes the concept of bitsized levels where the goal is simply, kill and not be killed.
With time slowed right down and speeding back up to normal speed with movement and action.....The levels play out more like mini puzzles than a pure shooting game.

So far so familiar.

Chrono strike add its own unique mechanics to spike things up with colour coded weapons and enemies amongst other surprises!

Live out your inner action movie fantasies as defelct bullets with swords, slow mo dodge out of shots and feel like a boss!

Thats just the start! The co op mode really shakes things up with some very clever sequences that demand a high level of team work.
Prepare to curse ans swear at your friends like you never done before as you blame each other for failures......till you find that synergy......calling out you partner to duck or chucking them a weapon when they are out of ammo.

Highly recommended!

This game plays as well as Superhot. It adds some new things to the mix such as color-coded enemies and objectives that stack for the next level. It also has Co-op, which is implemented almost perfectly, with puzzles that require you work together.

My only issue is that it was short. Co-op was done in two short sessions, and single player was completed in about three. Looking forward to some more content.

Similar gaming style as SuperHot, Vendetta Forever, and Action Hero, ChronoStrike brings even more excitement mostly because of the co-op multiplayer option. Not only is there strategy required to survive, you now have to effectively communicate with your co-op partner. Make a wrong move and you or your partner will be shot. Good luck!

I'm not good at shooting games. However, this appears to be the evolution of Super Hot. Although it is easier than SH in my experience so far, I need to use my brain and body at the same time like a puzzle to suit each situation with much more diverse enemies and items. Thanks to the dev team for such a good experience.

reviews.review_title: Great VR game if you played SHVR before
reviews.review_description: This game is truly great for those who played SUPER HOT VR before and enjoyed it, probably even better with coop but I played it alone. It adds a lot of new elements such as enemies, traps, and quick puzzles to solve. If you want actually MORE stuff, this game is definitive choice that is absolutely worth checking.

Slow-mo in VR? Count me in! This takes everything that made Superhot such a cult classic and turns it up to 11. From the weapons and level design, to the fact that it features co-op multiplayer, this game has been incredibly fun and they'll be adding even more to it in the coming months!

The company behind Swarm, Swarm 2 and Anomaly are making a 'superhot-like' game that can even be played in co-op mode? Had to try this out and it's very good and promising! The tutorial is good and simple and the levels are well crafted from what I've tested so far! I just wish I had a Quest 3 instead of a 2 since the controller's 'halo' are sometimes knocking each other off if I throw something and want to block nearby at the same time, but that's a gaming gear issue, not the game!

Hope there will be further missions added to lenghten the game because the first set of mission (out of 4) went by quickly!

If you're a Superhot fan, you need to give this a try!

Keep up the good work!

**UPDATE**
Now that I've tried Co-op mode with a friend, I must admit that it's a really nicccceee extra feature! Played only 45 minutes but we were sweating of all the slow-mo, core-body action, restart... Kill that guy first, I'll kill the other on your left...

Just hope more levels are on the way!

Greatjob Greensky Games!! :)

If you are an Inception, Matrix and/or Cyberpunk stuff, this game is for you. I really love how you can dodge bullets and kill enemies in a very Hollywood way, every level is like being in an action movie. I really love it!

Been having a blast going thru the single player campaign… I love all these SuperHot clone type games… Action Hero, Vendetta Forever, and now Chronostrike… all 3 offer something unique and improve the SuperHot formula.  If you like any of one of these games, you’ll like all of em, and vice versa.  Where this one seems to really shine is the co-op mode. Communication is key to passing a level and if ya don’t you’re scr*wed lol. The weapons are fun to use and earning new skins is a great way to keep me coming back for more.

reviews.review_title: A fun game using the Super Hot formula
reviews.review_description: I'm surprised by how much exercise I get dodging and avoiding bullets, grabbing guns and swords from the air, and taking out waves of bad guys.  A different graphical take on the very successful Super Hot formula.  Update: multiplayer is a blast. Had to remember to both be very still and move slowly, calling out where bad guys are and tossing weapons to each other when needed. Requires playing each level multiple times until you get it just right and then a great sense of satisfaction. It's really like a puzzle game that forces you to do slow motion yoga.

Thank you so much this game is truly and I mean truly one of the best made of this fashion you guys have done an amazing job this is definitely one of my favorites top tier suggest everyone and I mean everyone get this game immediately I love it thank you developers for the great job on developing such an amazing game highly recommended excuse me extremely highly recommended black shadow 2025

I have never played a superhot styled game and this did not disappoint me... it requires skill and definitely makes you sweat.  there are some minor issues which make you miss grabbing the weapon on time but it could also be my skill issue. At the end i liked it

I wanted to take my time to play this game a while before reviewing it.  I love the slo-mo fighting action.  The environments are great and I ama fan of puzzles.  It's been more than I expected, and I haven't even tried the co-op yet.  Recommend!

reviews.review_title: VR is always better with friends.
reviews.review_description:
Super Hot, action hero, and vendetta forever are amazing VR games. The concept is simple yet very fun and highly addictive. The only thing these games are missing is the ability to experience the slow mo action with a friend.

Enter Chronostrike!

With its own unique enemies, traps, and puzzles, this game will be your new go-to co-op experience.

I never really liked or played Superhot!

Yup!

So Chronostrike was my first time playing a game like this.

From what I can gather this is so much better as for the first time - the genre has co-op!

Buy Chronostrike and you won't be disappointed.

The campaign is action packed and innovative with flawless visuals and a decent length story arc to get you immersed.

The co-op is well thought out and a blast to play with a friend!

The developers are still actively supporting the game too with replayability features on the way!

A really exciting addition to the genre, good value for the money and a fun way to pass the time!

⌚ ❤️

This is basically what i would've expected Superhot 2 to be. 
The Shooting-"Puzzles" feel awesome, have lot's of Variants and Gadgets, there's also a Story and most important of all,  THERE'S FRIGGIN' CO-OP!!! ♥️ 
Totally blown away by this. Came out of nowhere and BOOM, straight into my Heart. 😍

Anyone who's a Fan of Superhot NEEDS TO BUY THIS! 🤘😃🤘

reviews.review_title: Clearly better than ‘the great role mode
reviews.review_description: similar mechanics as the big role model but paired with better graphics and especially with 2-player co-op... and I'm really looking forward to seeing how much fun it will be in multiplayer :-)

Loving it so far as it's like Superhot UPDATED!  There are 1-2 things that need to be fixed co-op (as of the time of this writing), but other than that I highly recommend this game. Will add a star when my co-op works smoother.
Superhot times 1000!!! Super epic!!

HIGHLY recommend for all Superhot fan, takes that concept and adds a ton of new stuff, co-op obviously being the biggest one!!! hats off to the devs this is how you build off an idea without just rehashing it.
My favorite game (vr) is super hot so when I saw this in beta I had to play it I love it it brings me back to the days of super hot the best part is the multiplayer
No updates 🤓☝️

reviews.review_title: Super hot and co-op dream team
reviews.review_description: Such a solid game. Adds to the super hot formula a lot.

Chronostrike is an awesome evolutionary step for fans of games like superhot. The goal is simple move - kill repeat, but the concept of time slowed down and speeding back again creates a dazzling an entangling gameplay loop. 

It is not a superhot clone but it takes the concept and evolves it: with unique gameplay elements like colour coded weapins and enemies. It has a very cineastic feeling and is a great game in to relax after work.

A full recommendation for me!

reviews.review_title: Insanely fun to play with others!
reviews.review_description: My partner and I had a blast playing the co-op segments of chronostrike. It’s intense, chaotic, but insanely fun and I was sore afterwards from holdings squats! We also posted our gameplay on our channel (@VRGamingCouple) if anyone wanted to see what it looks like! https://youtu.be/GJioff_1SNU?feature=shared

Just played with a friend. What a co-op super hot.
This is more than that. I can control time speed and we should co-op to solve the scenario.
The next evolution of the gameplay of superhot that you never knew you needed, super fun with friends!
Really fun game! Love the epic levels and awesome feeling of moving in Slow Mo. Co-op is a great addition!
This game is great such a fun game to play and is amazing in VR I really enjoy it have been a fan of shooter for a while and this is just awesome. Highly recommend it

What a game makes me feel like I am in the matrix love the way you need to remember where thay are coming from and who to shot first so you don't need too keep redoing it . Great work guys look forward to what you bing next to the vr community 👍

Superhot with more realistic graphics, and co-op mode. What else could you possibly want?? The ability to move time with a button is super helpful as well! Yet another fantastic game coming out of Greensky!
